title: Mini updates on my life
contents: well, i wanna make updates on what is currently happening because i'm feeling doing so
so, yesterday i was watching yahiamice going to random websites and he went to super####ingmario.com, and he didn't really solved and i wanted to see more cuz im the curious cat
i did inspected the code and OH MY GOODNESS!!... it's 11 THOUSAND LINES OF OBFUSCATED CODE.... still managed to get some things out of by debugging and using my _hacker abilities_ to access the code
###### _(to be fair, i actually just added `window.M = M` into the code and ran every function)_
and i am giving up on sfm, but it's a great product also
also i am currently working on this comic:
also i am unfortunately going trough another depression crisis as i am writing this
###### _(some factors might be: unable to play tomodachi life, feeling talentless, cant make music, my pc is dying, colelge, etc)_
anyways, i really need to go because i have college
